languages.text: "Немедленно исполню ваш приказ... Однако я бы воздержалась от трансляции на нижние палубы — их обитатели, скорее всего, и без того станут целью рейдов и обысков в связи со случившимся".

traits.locale_text: "Немедленно исполню ваш приказ... Однако я бы воздержалась от трансляции на нижние палубы — их обитатели, скорее всего, и без того станут целью рейдов и обысков в связи со случившимся".

languages.text: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."
languages.original_text: "Немедленно исполню ваш приказ... Однако я бы воздержалась от трансляции на нижние палубы — их обитатели, скорее всего, и без того станут целью рейдов и обысков в связи со случившимся".

traits.locale_text: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."
"I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."
"I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."

languages.text: “我会立刻执行您的命令……不过，我建议不要把消息广播到下层甲板。那里的居民本就经常是我们突击搜查的目标。”
languages.original_text: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."

traits.locale_text: “我会立刻执行您的命令……不过，我建议不要把消息广播到下层甲板。那里的居民本就经常是我们突击搜查的目标。”

languages.text: « Je m'en occupe immédiatement... Cependant, je vous déconseille de diffuser cette information sur les ponts inférieurs ; leurs résidents vont déjà être suffisamment visés par les attaques et les fouilles sauvages. »
languages.original_text: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."

traits.locale_text: « Je m'en occupe immédiatement... Cependant, je vous déconseille de diffuser cette information sur les ponts inférieurs ; leurs résidents vont déjà être suffisamment visés par les attaques et les fouilles sauvages. »

languages.text: «Ejecutaré sus órdenes de inmediato... Sin embargo, le recomendaría abstenerse de anunciarlo en las cubiertas inferiores. De todos modos, sus habitantes ya serán objetivo de redadas y registros».
languages.original_text: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."

traits.locale_text: «Ejecutaré sus órdenes de inmediato... Sin embargo, le recomendaría abstenerse de anunciarlo en las cubiertas inferiores. De todos modos, sus habitantes ya serán objetivo de redadas y registros».

languages.text: "Emirlerinizi derhâl yerine getireceğim... Ancak bunu alt güvertelere yayınlamaktan kaçınırdım. Oradaki sakinler, hâlihazırda baskınların ve aramaların hedefi olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."

traits.locale_text: "Emirlerinizi derhâl yerine getireceğim... Ancak bunu alt güvertelere yayınlamaktan kaçınırdım. Oradaki sakinler, hâlihazırda baskınların ve aramaların hedefi olacaktır."

languages.text: "Ich werde Eure Befehle umgehend ausführen ... Ich würde allerdings davon absehen, die unteren Decks zu informieren. Die dortigen Bewohner könnten sonst Opfer von Razzien und Durchsuchungen werden."
languages.original_text: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Eure Befehle umgehend ausführen ... Ich würde allerdings davon absehen, die unteren Decks zu informieren. Die dortigen Bewohner könnten sonst Opfer von Razzien und Durchsuchungen werden."

languages.text: 「直ちにご命令を実行いたします……ただ、これを下層デッキに広めるのは、お控えになったほうがよろしいかと――あそこの住民たちは、ただでさえ手入れや捜索の標的にされかねませんので」
languages.original_text: "I will carry out your orders immediately... However, I would refrain from broadcasting this to the lower decks — the denizens there are likely to be the target of raids and searches as it is."

traits.locale_text: 「直ちにご命令を実行いたします……ただ、これを下層デッキに広めるのは、お控えになったほうがよろしいかと――あそこの住民たちは、ただでさえ手入れや捜索の標的にされかねませんので」
